infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access for photographing invoices and documents.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access for voice notes and diary entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access to select photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Photo library access to save photos.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Speech recognition for voice notes and diary entries.

plugins.photosPermission: Aplikácia potrebuje prístup k vašim fotkám na pridanie príloh.
plugins.cameraPermission: Aplikácia potrebuje prístup ku kamere na fotografovanie faktúr a dokumentov.

plugins.microphonePermission: Táto aplikácia potrebuje prístup k mikrofónu na nahrávanie hlasových správ a zápisov do denníka.

plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: This app uses speech recognition for voice notes and diary entries.
